description: list the files in a public NVIDIA NGC model version (the NGC counterpart of hf_list_files) so the acquire phase knows what to download
rules: Inputs are regex-validated (^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$) to prevent URL escaping before the API call
NGC_TEAM may be the empty string for models with no team segment — the URL path is built accordingly
Uses HTTPS + TLSv1.2 with a bounded 30s timeout; the JSON response is parsed via the stdlib json module, not a shell pipe
usage: Set NGC_ORG, MODEL_NAME and NGC_VERSION (and optionally NGC_TEAM). Output: ngc-files.txt (one filename per line) and ngc-list-files.json (audit manifest with the file count).
limitation: Needs outbound network access to api.ngc.nvidia.com for real data; offline it degrades gracefully to an empty file list. Public model versions only — no NGC auth/token handling is performed.
